failure_modes.cause: BPR set at 5.0 bar, but 41.5 bar required
Vapour pressure of TBAB/EG solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Prolonged exposure to 120°C may degrade TBAB/EG
failure_modes.mitigation: Limit residence time and monitor solvent integrity

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Test BPR at 41.5 bar with water to ensure it can maintain pressure without failure
Run blank TBAB/EG solvent at 120°C for 60 min; monitor for signs of degradation
Run system at Q=3.81543 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure stability and cavitation signs
